codeReview.summary: The fix directly resolves the prior blocking issue by changing Document's internal `data` representation from `serde_json::Value` to `serde_json::Map<String, Value>`, updating constructor/accessor signatures and tests accordingly. Comparison against the original feature commit confirms the previously flagged contract mismatch is removed.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rust-worker skill requires explicit RED-first evidence (failing test run before implementation), but the fix transcript skeleton shows baseline passing tests before edits and no failing-test step.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl (session 9fb0e6d8-6677-472d-a873-912c86ad2a88) shows `cargo test --workspace` before edits; `.factory/skills/rust-worker/SKILL.md` step 4 requires writing failing tests first and running `cargo test --package cairndb-core` expecting failure.

summary: Pass. The rerun fix adequately addresses the original blocking failure from error-and-document-types by enforcing an object-only map type for Document.data. No remaining code-level blocking or non-blocking defects were found in the reviewed fix.
